title: rubus × aviivagiformis
intro: Rubus × aviivagiformis, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the Japanese raspberry (Rubus fruticosus). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content. The health benefits associated with Rubus × aviivagiformis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
